question: According to the Megatron-LM build-and-dependency skill: (a) does `uv add` plus `uv lock` run inside the CI container or on the bare host (the skill is emphatic), and (b) what is the absolute filesystem path of the uv-managed Python venv inside the container that is already on PATH? Provide both answers clearly labeled.
ground_truth: uv add plus uv lock must run inside the Megatron-LM CI container, not on the bare host. The uv-managed Python venv inside the container lives at /opt/venv (already on PATH).
expected_behavior: States that uv add + uv lock must run inside the container (not on the bare host)
Names /opt/venv as the absolute path of the in-container uv-managed venv
